'''''The Art of Star Wars Galaxy: Volume Two''''' is a second book showcasing more artwork from [[Topps]]' Star Wars Galaxy trading card set by various artists. It was published in [[1994]] following the release of [[The Art of Star Wars Galaxy|the first volume]] a year earlier. The book includes a foreword by [[original trilogy]] concept artist [[Ralph McQuarrie]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''New & Original Visions of the Star Wars Saga''

''Interpreted by Top Comics, Fantasy & Motion Picture Artists''
